body.concept: Claude models form a 3-tier system trading intelligence for speed and cost. All tiers share the same capabilities (text/image input, text output, multilingual, vision) — they differ only in how smart and fast they are.
body.analogy: Think of it like car rental tiers: Economy (Haiku) gets you there fast and cheap, Mid-size (Sonnet) is comfortable for most trips, and Luxury (Opus) handles the toughest terrain. All cars drive on the same roads — you're choosing how much power you need.
body.visual: A triangle with three horizontal layers. Top (smallest): Opus — max intelligence. Middle: Sonnet — balanced. Bottom (widest): Haiku — max speed/throughput. Arrow on left labeled 'Intelligence ↑', arrow on right labeled 'Speed & Cost-efficiency ↑' pointing down.
